theme: shopkeeper survives every embargo in the almanac
title: Shopkeeper Survives Every Embargo in the Almanac
strategies: trivial: order-up-to a bare minimum (mean demand times lead time only, no safety margin, no hoarding ever) -- runs chronically thin even in calm timelines

naive greedy: textbook base-stock policy sized from the sample mean/std of the revealed demand series, with a standard safety margin, but NEVER hoards -- completely blind to the precursor signal and to embargoes; this is the evaluator's own BASE reference by construction

insight (strong): compute the base-stock target from the demand data as greedy does, but ALSO read the precursor signal's OWN distribution across every timeline in the instance to set a statistically-separated trigger (mean + k*std of the signal), size a hoard buffer from the demand data to cover a plausible shock duration, and hold that elevated target for several days after each trigger (cooldown) since the signal itself fades before the embargo ends -- funding the insurance by staying lean everywhere else

a general solver could go further: fit the precursor ramp shape and typical shock duration directly from how long each detected plateau lasts, or search over (trigger, hoard_target, cooldown) jointly against a resimulated proxy objective built only from the public demand/signal data
